description_long: This is a large, cylindrical trash bin made of dark-colored plastic, commonly found in urban environments such as streets, parks, and public spaces. The bin features a wide, open top with a reinforced rim for added durability and ease of waste disposal. Two robust, angular side handles are integrated into the upper section, allowing for easy lifting and maneuvering. The surface is smooth and matte, with no visible texture or decorative elements, giving it a utilitarian appearance. There are no visible wheels or lid, and the bin is unmarked, lacking any signage or labeling. The overall design prioritizes functionality, with a spacious interior suitable for collecting large volumes of waste.
description: A large, dark plastic cylindrical trash bin with integrated side handles and an open top, designed for high-capacity waste collection in public spaces. The surface is smooth and unmarked, emphasizing utility.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical body, wide open top, and one of the angular side handles extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the integrated handle structure and the smooth, unmarked surface of the bin.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the opposite side handle and the bin's symmetrical design.
description_view_3: Side view with the handle structure visible, showing the same utilitarian features as the other side.
